历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19059 → 19437 → 21658 → 22225 → 22374, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3315 positions in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 22374, and the backward shift has narrowed in the last 2 years (only 149 positions from 2024 to 2025), indicating weakening momentum; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 117 in 2021, 123 in 2022, 122 in 2023, 131 in 2024, and 136 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion; the 2026 plan is 146, an increase of 10 over 2025 (an expansion rate of about 7.35%), the largest expansion in recent years, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition; in 2022, there was a negative academic misconduct incident (teacher disciplined), but recent reputation has been stable with no significant new negative events; Douyin popularity ranking is 75th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a mid-level, showing no clear signal of increased application interest; no record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, four disciplines—Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science—were rated A-, all core agricultural and forestry disciplines closely related to the university's enrollment majors, providing stable support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular socially, and the university offers related majors; the popularity of agricultural and forestry core majors is generally average and polarized; the total number of Gaokao registrants in the province for 2026 is about 451,000, slightly down from about 462,000 in 2025, but the proportion of Physics Category candidates is about 69%, keeping the competition base high; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 461 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; the university is located in Xianyang, Shaanxi, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; the enrollment scale in Anhui is relatively large (146 in Physics Category), making it an important source of students outside the province, with no significant regional preference shift.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the intensifying effect of the 7.35% enrollment expansion in 2026 on competition, the positive impact of the steadily rising Soft Science ranking on attractiveness, and the still high base of provincial candidates, with slight positive adjustments due to the ranking increase and slight decrease in total candidates; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 23281, with a range of 22781–23781.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 23281, with a range of 22781–23781. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (22781) are advised to focus on Tier 1 popular engineering majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information); candidates in the middle range should target Tier 2 advantageous disciplines and emerging interdisciplinary majors; candidates near the upper limit (23781) should use Tier 3 agricultural and forestry specialty majors as a safety net, while also considering the university's A- disciplines (Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, Grassland Science) and their corresponding enrollment majors, which offer high cost-effectiveness.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. There was a negative academic misconduct incident in 2022, but in recent years, the reputation has been stable with no significant new negative events. The predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 2307, with a range of 1892–2722.
